notes: Fixed guided setup navigation so Next/Back/Skip no longer use Streamlit callbacks that can surface rerun warnings.
Made guided setup feel more like a primary orientation flow with vertical progress and a cleaner transition into the workspace.
Removed the duplicate full-workspace skip expander and kept one Skip setup for now action.
Changed setup examples into placeholders and guidance only, with no committed records unless the user saves a form.
Improved setup examples, routine duration defaults, first-step routine activity guidance, review/export/archive orientation, and DD-MM-YYYY date validation for NZ users.
